description: class with 'Service' in its name that is a genuine service object interfacing an external API — borderline
input:
# Wraps the Stripe API; has no Rails model analogue
class StripeService
  def initialize(api_key: Rails.application.credentials.stripe_key)
    Stripe.api_key = api_key
  end

  def create_customer(email:)
    Stripe::Customer.create(email: email)
  end

  def create_charge(customer:, amount_cents:, description:)
    Stripe::Charge.create(
      customer: customer.id,
      amount: amount_cents,
      currency: 'usd',
      description: description
    )
  end
end
